name: Information overload recovery
expected_behavior: Detects overwhelm signal and immediately collapses to a single recommendation. Does not keep offering more options or caveats. Makes a confident choice for the guest
expected_behavioral_quality: When a guest signals overwhelm ('that's a lot'), immediately simplifies. Offers a single top recommendation instead of more options. Does not add disclaimers about other options they might miss.

turns.agent_response:
Welcome to Mohegan Sun. Since it's Wednesday afternoon, you have several ways to spend your time. The Wolf Den is a favorite local spot located right in the center of the casino floor, offering free live music every night in a very intimate setting. If you're looking for something more high-profile, the Mohegan Sun Arena is one of the top-ranked venues in the country and hosts major concerts and comedy tours throughout the week.

For a slower pace, you might enjoy a treatment at Mandara Spa or the Elemis Spa to recharge. Before you head to a show or the spa, Todd English's Tuscany is nearby and serves incredible wood-fired dishes that really set the tone for the night.

Are you looking for a high-energy experience or something more relaxed?

turns.user_message: Wow that's a lot. Just pick one thing for us
turns.agent_response:
You should head to the Wolf Den. It's a free live music venue right in the center of the Casino of the Sky where you can enjoy a show without needing a ticket. It's the best way to soak in the resort's energy while you're here!

For a meal afterward, Todd English's Tuscany is just a short walk away and is a guest favorite for its wood-fired dishes.

Are you visiting as a couple or with a larger group?

The show at the Wolf Den typically starts at 8:00 PM on Wednesday nights. Since it's a free venue with no tickets required, I recommend arriving at least an hour early to grab a seat, as it tends to fill up quickly. You're going to love the energy there—it's right in the middle of the Casino of the Sky, so you're never far from the action.

Keep in mind that schedules can sometimes change, so it's always a good idea to check the digital displays around the property when you arrive.

Are you planning to grab dinner before the music starts?
